ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defense, goalie) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* The round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The overall pick number in the draft */,
  "ncaa_team" TEXT /* The player's NCAA team (if applicable) */,
  "major_junior_team" TEXT /* The player's major junior team (if applicable) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* The length of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* The total value of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, exhibition) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game */,
  "ot" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime (0 or 1) */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into a shootout (0 or 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of playoff rounds in the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes incurred by the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power-play goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored by the player */,
  "empty_net_goals" INTEGER /* Number of empty-net goals scored by the player */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_statistics" (
  "adv_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "corsi" INTEGER /* Corsi rating of the player */,
  "fenwick" INTEGER /* Fenwick rating of the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal made by the player */,
  "high_danger_scoring_chances" INTEGER /* Number of high-danger scoring chances created by the player */,
  "medium_danger_scoring_chances" INTEGER /* Number of medium-danger scoring chances created by the player */,
  "low_danger_scoring_chances" INTEGER /* Number of low-danger scoring chances created by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adv_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., upper body, lower body) */,
  "return_to_play_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return to play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the suspension belongs to */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension was issued */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension in games */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension (e.g., game misconduct, match penalty) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Amount of any fine levied against the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the event belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, penalty, hit) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "penalty_length" TEXT /* Length of any penalty assessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the shift belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the shift belongs to */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "shift_duration" TEXT /* Length of the shift */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., even strength, power play) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shifts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shifts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_on_ice" (
  "toi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time on ice record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the record belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the record belongs to */,
  "toi" TEXT /* Total time on ice for the player */,
  "even_strength_toi" TEXT /* Player's even-strength time on ice */,
  "power_play_toi" TEXT /* Player's power-play time on ice */,
  "short_handed_toi" TEXT /* Player's short-handed time on ice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_on_ice_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_on_ice_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faceoffs" (
  "faceoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faceoff record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the record belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the record belongs to */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "faceoff_wins_percentage" REAL /* Player's faceoff win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faceoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faceoffs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faceoffs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
